title: Nutcracker,Nut Crackers Heavy Duty with Non-Slip Handle,Stainless Steel Nut Opener Tool for Walnut Hazelnut Almonds Pecan Seafood
features: ◆►【Heavy Duty】:This nutcracker is made of high quality stainless steel, making it sturdy, heavy duty and durable. It is not easy to break or rust.

◆►【Sawtooth Design】: Nutcracker features two different zigzag designs, a small one and a large one, suitable for different sizes of nuts. It can firmly clamp items without them easily falling off and better withstand stress, so even hardshell food won't break.
◆►【Durable and Practical】: The core sucker design of the nutcracker is very flexible; it can be expanded up to 180 degrees, making it easy to carry and clean.
◆►【Perfect for Crushing Nuts】: You can use this nutcracker to crush many kinds of nuts such as nuts, Brazil nuts, walnuts, hazelnuts, almonds, pecans, almonds, lobster, and others.

◆►【Easy to Use】: Notice: Starting in 2024, our upgraded Nut Crackers use thicker handles to improve the feel and comfort, the weight of the Nut Cracker tool has also increased from 170g to 200g,and it will be more durable and better quality. This Nutcracker is your best choice for cracking nuts.
description: Product Description Heavy-Duty Nut Cracker – Effortless, Durable Tool for All Nuts Enjoy effortless nut cracking with this high-quality tool. Built for comfortable, effortless nut cracking. Weighing around 200 grams, t he new 2025 Nut Cracker offers enhanced strength and durability. It offers strength, stability and reliable performance for walnuts, hazelnuts, pecans and more. Weighing around 200g Dimensions: approx. 17×4×1cm (L×W×H) This is the actual product Experience the latest 2025 upgraded Nut Crackers Ideal for walnuts, hazelnuts, pecans, chestnuts ,brazil nuts and similar nuts. this tool delivers stable, consistent results every time. Its sturdy build and ergonomic handle provide excellent grip and control, making nut cracking a safe and satisfying experience. Note: May not work for hard black walnut. Symbol of Warmth and Family – Share happiness and health through fresh nuts Create warm, joyful moments during the holidays or family gatherings. Whether it’s Christmas, New Year’s Eve, or Sunday tea time, this nut cracker makes it easy to enjoy freshly cracked nuts together. A simple nut cracker tool that brings the family around the table — cracking, chatting and laughing together.
